summary: Mission v11.5 - Date/Heure Réservation & Sécurité VALIDATED. Fixed date format in BookingPanel.js to include year. Backend data intact (20 reservations, 14 contacts). All features pass: subscription info bar, X close button, Réserver button without border, dates now show year (e.g., Mercredi 4 mars 2026 à 19:30).

minor.issue: Code BOSS was missing from discount_codes (only BOOST existed). Added BOSS code for testing.
minor.note: Subscription with BOSS code existed in subscriptions collection but validation endpoint required it in discount_codes

issues: Date format shows 'Mercredi 4 mars à 19:30' but missing year. Expected: 'Samedi 15 mars 2026 à 18h30'
